Landing.title: Track scores across multiple sports, run tournaments, and crown the Master of All
Landing.subtitle: Unify match recording, rankings, and tournaments with a single toolkit that your club can run in an afternoon.
Landing.supportingCopy: Purpose-built for clubs that juggle padel, bowling, tennis, disc golf, and more.
Landing.featureHeading: Why teams choose Cross Sport Tracker

multiSport.title: Truly multi-sport
multiSport.body: Padel on Monday, disc golf on Friday. Configure formats, rulesets, and scoring to fit every code.

tournaments.title: Run brackets and ladders
tournaments.body: Spin up tournaments with elimination brackets, bronze finals, and rolling ladders without spreadsheets.

leaderboards.title: Crown the Master of All
leaderboards.body: Blend results across sports, keep rivalries alive, and reward all-rounders with shared leaderboards.

notifications.title: Keep everyone synced
notifications.body: Localized emails, reminders, and status updates make sure no one misses their next showdown.

Landing.workflowHeading: From first serve to season champion
Landing.workflowBody: Cross Sport Tracker captures every rally, keeps tournaments on time, and celebrates the all-rounder who conquers every bracket.

workflowItems.capture: Record multi-sport results with guardrails for rulesets and tiebreaks.
workflowItems.manage: Coordinate brackets, bronze finals, and ladders without manual spreadsheets.
workflowItems.share: Publish leaderboards instantly so everyone knows who is chasing Master of All.

Demo.title: Jump into the demo
Demo.subtitle: We preloaded a fictional club so you can explore matches, ladders, and leaderboards instantly.
Demo.loaded: Demo data loaded. Scroll through tournaments, matches, and leaders below.
Demo.supportingCopy: Refresh the sandbox anytime to explore a new set of fictional results.
Demo.sportBlurb: Configured rules, players, and formats so you can preview the experience.

club.label: Played at club
club.hint: Select the club where the match was played, or leave blank if it wasn't at a club.
club.homeSelected: Using your home club from your player profile.

friendly.label: Mark as friendly
friendly.hint: Friendly matches appear in match history but do not impact leaderboards or player statistics.

date.label: Date
date.formatHint: Date format follows your profile preferences.

hints.save: Save once each side has at least one player and completed sets are entered as needed.

messages.padelAmericanoSaved: Padel Americano tie saved. Update the players and scores to record the next tie.
messages.selectPlayerForEachEntry: Please select a player for each entry.
messages.addAtLeastTwoBowlingPlayers: Add at least two bowling players.
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please review players/scores and try again.
messages.selectPlayersForBothSides: Please select players for both sides.
messages.invalidGameScores: Invalid game scores. Please review and try again.
messages.enterWholeNumberScores: Enter whole-number scores for both teams.
messages.padelRequiresWinner: Padel matches require a winner. Adjust the set totals.
messages.padelFinishAtTwoSets: Padel matches finish when a side wins two sets. Adjust the totals.
messages.padelMaxOneLosingSet: Padel matches allow at most one set for the losing side. Adjust the totals.
messages.resolveDuplicateNames: Resolve duplicate player names before saving.
messages.loginRequired: You need to be logged in to record matches. Please log in or sign up.
messages.duplicateNamesReturned: Duplicate player names returned: {names}. Each player name must be unique before saving.
messages.gamesWonSoFar: Games won so far: Team A {winsA} – Team B {winsB}.

hints.addSet: Add another set if the match extended beyond the recorded sets.

padelAmericano.tieTargetHint: Total points available in this tie. Common choices include 16 (4 serves each pair), 24 (6 serves each pair), or 32 (8 serves each pair).
padelAmericano.tieTargetRequired: Enter a positive tie target before saving your padel Americano tie.
padelAmericano.tieTargetMismatchPrefix: Padel Americano totals must match your tie target of

tips.heading: Recording a padel Americano tie
tips.intro: Review the Americano rotation before saving each tie so every player pairing is captured accurately.
tips.signInBody: logging in keeps all of your Americano ties together and lets you resume an unfinished session.
tips.pairingsBody: Americanos are always doubles, so pick the two players on each side exactly as shown on your rotation sheet.
tips.scoreBody: enter the total points earned by each pair (for example Team A 24 – Team B 20 in a race to 32). Use the target your club prefers if it differs from 32.
tips.detailsBody: record the date, start time and venue so everyone can find the tie later. Mark it as friendly for social hits.
tips.fixturesBody: Generate a full Americano schedule before logging results here so you can follow the rotation without leaving this page.

bowling.infoIconTitle: Enter 0-10 for pins. Use X for strikes, / to finish a spare, and - for gutters.
bowling.shortcutSpare: Set to spare (fill frame to 10 pins)

hero.title: Record a match
hero.subtitle: Pick your sport and start logging scores with the exact fields, sets, and summaries you need. Share results instantly or keep them as a personal streak.
hero.description: Each one comes with a tailored form so you can focus on the match, not the paperwork.

grid.title: Beautiful scorecards in a tap
grid.subtitle: From racquet sports to precision throws, select a sport to open a form tuned to its rules. Save matches, share highlights, and keep your streak alive.

pill.title: Built for quick entry
pill.caption: Tap, score, and publish without losing momentum.

sportDescriptions.badminton: Track shuttle rallies, sets, and decisive points in seconds.
sportDescriptions.bowling: Log frames, strikes, and spares to keep the leaderboard honest.
sportDescriptions.discGolf: Capture every hole score with a layout built for the course.
sportDescriptions.padel: Serve, volley, and record match momentum without missing a point.
sportDescriptions.padelAmericano: Made for round-robin rotations and quick score updates.
sportDescriptions.pickleball: Dial in rally scoring and side outs for every game you play.
sportDescriptions.tableTennis: Perfect for fast rallies, deuce points, and multi-game matches.
sportDescriptions.tennis: Track sets, tie-breaks, and match momentum with ease.
sportDescriptions.default: Capture scores, sets, and moments with a tailored form.
